mapper.select: SELECT TABLE_COMMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = #{table} LIMIT 1

SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_COMMENT, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_KEY, COLUMN_DEFAULT, EXTRA FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = #{table} ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION
